_comment: AUDIO TAUNT LIBRARY — data-driven. Each entry: id (unique, stable), label (menu text), file (path under /assets/). Adding real clips is ZERO code: drop the audio file into assets/taunts/ and add a line here. An empty list is valid (the menu just shows nothing). The 3 entries below are tiny synthesized placeholders generated by tools/gen-taunt-placeholders.mjs so the whole play/relay/3D-audio path is testable now; replace/extend them with the ~50 real clips later. tools/check-taunts.mjs asserts ids are unique and every file exists.
